results.revised_prompt: Create a stylized concept asset for a primary school music classroom H5 activity: exactly one playable Western flute skin / performance board, centered and large, isolated on a clean bright background with generous whitespace. The flute should be a realistic silver metal concert flute with clearly visible keys, polished but child-friendly, crisp edges, suitable for touch interaction and later click-zone mapping. Composition must contain only one instrument, no other instruments, no tiles, no collage, no contact sheet, no text, no logo, no watermark. Do not resemble a recorder or bamboo flute; make it unmistakably a Western flute. Bright, clean, realistic classroom illustration asset, simple uncluttered background, projection-friendly.
